title: Gas report - Week 19
summary:
LNG
There has been some fixing activity on the spot with LNG. At the beginning of the week a 155 cbm vessel was fixed from Gladstone up to JKTC for mid-June dates in the high $40,000s. The market has since come down a touch, with rates falling to $43,262 on BLNG1g, a decrease of $6,764 on the week.

children.title: LNG
children.summary: There has been some fixing activity on the spot with LNG. At the beginning of the week a 155 cbm vessel was fixed from Gladstone up to JKTC for mid-June dates in the high $40,000s.

children.title: LPG
children.summary: The Middle East has continued its bull run, with rates rising just under $10.5 over the week to give a closing index publication of $90.143 (a daily TCEC earning return of $75,423). On Monday a rise of $7 in the index set the week off to a good start with market participants seeing bid/offers at ever increasing numbers.
